indicators.name: Large window
indicators.rationale: The large window provides natural light and a view, which can enhance concentration and mood.

indicators.name: Marble counter
indicators.rationale: The marble counter is clean and smooth, suitable for placing a laptop and other work materials.

indicators.name: Brick walls
indicators.rationale: Brick walls add character to the space but do not directly impact the suitability for computer work.

indicators.name: Bar stools
indicators.rationale: Bar stools are not suitable seating for extended periods of computer work as they lack back support.

reasoning_summary: The space has positive aspects such as natural light and a clean surface, but lacks ergonomic seating, making it marginally adequate for solo computer work.
